calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2013 Vacated

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Off Calendar

Petition For Compromise Of Claim; Ntc
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Bradley D. Fell, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Hilary Passman Cherniss, mother and guardian ad litem for Minors: Joely Cherniss and Stella Cherniss present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Minor 1 Joely Cherniss:
Total Settlement: $47,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $ 15,643.65 payable to Law Office of Bradley D. Fell.
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the total amount of $8,447.63
Payee: Accent (Blue Shield of California) PO Box 69006, Omaha, NE 68106-5006.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amount of $360.00 Hilary Passman Cherniss: $225.00 (filing fee complaint), Bradley D. Fell $75.00 Jury fees and $60.00 filing fees for motion.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $24,451.28.
A net balance of $23,048.72 to be deposited into a blocked account at San Francisco Police Credit Union 2520 Irving Street, San Francisco, CA 94122 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 25, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

Minor 2 Stella Cherniss:
Total Settlement: $47,500.00
Attorney's Fees: $ 15,643.65 payable to Law Office of Bradley D. Fell.
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers as follows, in the total amount of $8,447.63
Payee: Accent (Blue Shield of California) PO Box 69006, Omaha, NE 68106-5006.
Other authorized disbursements payable directly to third parties in the total amount of $360.00 Hilary Passman Cherniss: $225.00 (filing fee complaint), Bradley D. Fell $75.00 Jury fees and $60.00 filing fees for motion.
Total allowance for fees and expenses from the settlement or judgment: $24,451.28.
A net balance of $23,048.72 to be deposited into a blocked account at San Francisco Police Credit Union 2520 Irving Street, San Francisco, CA 94122 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 25, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
